jtwc.title: Hurricane 06E (Fausto) Warning #14
jtwc.text:
WTPN32 PHNC 221000
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/HURRICANE 06E (FAUSTO) WARNING NR 014//
RMKS/
1. HURRICANE 06E (FAUSTO) WARNING NR 014    
   01 ACTIVE TROPICAL CYCLONE IN EASTPAC

   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY

   220600Z --- NEAR 16.6N 120.4W
